swahili.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Hubadilisha ingizo. Imejengwa kutoka PMOS 1 + NMOS 1 (kigeuzi cha CMOS).
swahili.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Toleo ni la juu tu wakati ingizo zote mbili ni za juu. NAND + NOT (transista 6).
swahili.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Toleo ni la juu wakati ingizo lolote ni la juu. NOR + NOT (transista 6).
swahili.universal_gate_2_series_nmos_2_paralle: Mlango wa ulimwengu wote! NMOS 2 za mfululizo + PMOS 2 sambamba. Mantiki yote kutoka NAND.
swahili.universal_gate_2_parallel_nmos_2_serie: Mlango wa ulimwengu wote! NMOS 2 sambamba + PMOS 2 za mfululizo.
swahili.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Toleo ni la juu wakati ingizo zinatofautiana. Muhimu kwa vijumlishi. Hutumia transista ~8.
swahili.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Toleo ni la juu wakati ingizo zinalingana. Hutumika katika vilinganishi.
swahili.data_table_a_b_q: Jedwali la data: A, B, Q
swahili.build_a_circuit_from_components_add_pa: Jenga mzunguko kutoka kwa vipengele. Ongeza sehemu, kisha iga!
swahili.click_components_above_to_add_them: Bofya vipengele hapo juu ili kuviongeza
swahili.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: Fito ya silikoni huvutwa kutoka silikoni iliyoyeyuka kwa njia ya Czochralski katika ~1414 °C.
swahili.the_ingot_is_sliced_into_thin_wafers_7: Fito hukatwa kuwa wafer nyembamba (~775 μm unene) kwa misumeno ya waya wa almasi.
swahili.a_thin_layer_of_sio_is_grown_on_the_wa: Safu nyembamba ya SiO₂ hukuzwa juu ya uso wa wafer katika ~1000 °C katika tanuru ya oksijeni.
swahili.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: Mwanga wa UV huhamisha mifumo ya mzunguko kutoka kinyago hadi wafer zenye fotorezisti.
swahili.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: Nyenzo zisizohitajika huondolewa kwa uchoraji wa kemikali (mvua) au plasma (kavu).
swahili.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: Atomu za dopanti hurushwa kwenye silikoni kwa nishati ya juu ili kubadilisha sifa zake za umeme.
swahili.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: Safu za chuma na kizio huwekwa kwa mbinu za CVD, PVD au ALD.
swahili.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: Miunganisho ya chuma hutengenezwa kwa mifumo na kung'arishwa tambarare. Safu nyingi hujenga uwiring wa mzunguko.
swahili.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Grafu ya Sheria ya Moore inayoonyesha idadi ya transista kutoka 1965 hadi 2030
swahili.6_transistors_per_bit_2_cross_coupled_: Transista 6 kwa kila biti: vigeuzi 2 vilivyounganishwa msalaba + transista 2 za ufikiaji. Hutumika katika kaki za CPU.
swahili.1_transistor_1_capacitor_per_bit_must_: Transista 1 + kapasita 1 kwa kila biti. Lazima ionyeshwe upya kila ~64 ms. Hutumika katika kumbukumbu kuu (moduli za RAM).
swahili.floating_gate_transistor_traps_charge_: Transista ya lango elea hunasa chaji. NOR: ufikiaji nasibu, hutumika katika programu-dhibiti/BIOS.
swahili.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Malango elea yaliyounganishwa mfululizo. Ufikiaji wa mfuatano lakini mnene sana. SSD, viendeshi vya USB, kadi za SD.
swahili.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: Kapasita ya feroeletriki huhifadhi chaji kwa polarizesheni iliyobaki. Isiyo tete + uandishi wa haraka. Hutumika katika kadi mahiri, magari.
swahili.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Kikuza cha volteji. Impedansi kubwa ya ingizo (∞ kwa bora). Faida = -gₘRₓ. Hubadilisha ishara. Kikuza cha MOSFET cha kawaida zaidi.
swahili.voltage_buffer_gain_1_no_inversion_low: Bafa ya volteji. Faida ≈ 1 (hakuna ubadilishaji). Impedansi ndogo ya toleo → nzuri kuendesha mizigo. Pia huitwa mfuasi wa chanzo.
swahili.current_buffer_low_input_impedance_non: Bafa ya mkondo. Impedansi ndogo ya ingizo. Isiyobadilisha. Kipimo pana → nzuri kwa matumizi ya RF.
swahili.bjt_voltage_amplifier_gain_g_r_inverts: Kikuza cha volteji cha BJT. Faida = -gₘRᶜ. Hubadilisha ishara. Faida kubwa kuliko MOSFET lakini impedansi ndogo ya ingizo.
swahili.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Hukuza tofauti ya ingizo mbili. Hukataa kelele ya modi ya pamoja. Msingi wa vikuza vya op. CMRR kawaida >60dB.
swahili.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Mapengo ya bendi kati ya 0.5 na 3.5 eV ni nusukondakta.
swahili.extra_electrons_n_for_negative_charge_: Elektroni za ziada = N kwa wabebaji wa chaji Hasi.
swahili.carriers_recombine_at_the_junction_lea: Wabebaji huungana tena kwenye makutano wakiacha ioni zisizohamishika.
swahili.positive_gate_attracts_electrons_to_fo: Lango chanya huvutia elektroni kuunda njia.
swahili.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: Nishati zaidi ya joto = jozi zaidi za elektroni-tundu.
swahili.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND inaweza kutekeleza NOT, AND, OR — kila kitu!
swahili.pmos_nmos_work_as_a_complementary_pair: PMOS + NMOS hufanya kazi kama jozi kamilishi.
swahili.speed_mobility_gaas_8500_vs_si_1400_cm: Kasi ∝ uhamaji. GaAs: 8500 vs Si: 1400 cm²/Vs.
swahili.zener_diodes_are_designed_to_conduct_i: Diodi za Zener zimeundwa kuendesha kinyume!
swahili.boron_has_3_valence_electrons_1_fewer_: Boroni ina elektroni 3 za valensi (1 chini ya Si).
swahili.v_kt_q_ln_n_n_n_for_typical_doping_lev: Vₑᵢ = (kT/q)ln(NₐNₓ/nᵢ²) kwa viwango vya kawaida vya udopaji.
swahili.in_cmos_one_transistor_is_always_off_b: Katika CMOS, transista moja huwa imezimwa daima, ikizuia mkondo.
swahili.n_1_for_ideal_junction_n_2_for_recombi: n=1 kwa makutano bora, n=2 kwa muungano upya katika eneo la upungufu.
swahili.e_3_4_ev_allows_higher_voltage_operati: Eₗ = 3.4 eV inaruhusu uendeshaji wa volteji ya juu.
swahili.sum_a_xor_b_carry_a_and_b: Jumla = A XOR B, Beba = A AND B.
swahili.higher_v_ce_widens_the_depletion_regio: V_CE ya juu hupanua eneo la upungufu ndani ya besi.
swahili.e_1_l_smaller_box_higher_energy_steps: E ∝ 1/L² — kisanduku kidogo = hatua kubwa za nishati.
swahili.telecom_lasers_use_ingaasp_quantum_wel: Leza za mawasiliano hutumia visima vya kwantamu vya InGaAsP kwa udhibiti sahihi wa urefu wa wimbi.
swahili.6t_sram_2_cross_coupled_inverters_4t_2: SRAM 6T: vigeuzi 2 vilivyounganishwa msalaba (4T) + transista 2 za ufikiaji.
swahili.dram_stores_bits_as_charge_on_a_tiny_c: DRAM huhifadhi biti kama chaji kwenye kapasita ndogo — huvuja!
swahili.the_floating_gate_is_electrically_isol: Lango elea limetengwa kwa umeme kwa safu za oksidi.
swahili.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: Kaki ya L1 inahitaji muda wa haraka zaidi wa ufikiaji.
swahili.it_s_a_buffer_unity_gain_impedance_tra: Ni bafa: faida ya kitengo, mabadiliko ya impedansi.
swahili.higher_gain_lower_bandwidth_a_bw_gbw_c: Faida kubwa = kipimo kidogo. Aᵥ × BW = GBW = thabiti.
swahili.a_swarm_of_logic_bugs_what_gate_output: Kundi la hitilafu za mantiki! Ni lango gani hutoa 1 wakati A=0?
swahili.a_voltage_spike_is_overloading_which_d: Mruko wa volteji unazidisha mzigo! Ni kifaa gani kinachodhibiti volteji?
swahili.temperature_rising_in_a_semiconductor_: Joto linaongezeka! Katika nusukondakta, ongezeko la joto hufanya nini kwa uendeshaji?
swahili.an_enemy_flipped_all_bits_which_gate_c: Adui amegeuza biti zote! Ni lango gani linaweza kugeuza kila ishara?
swahili.carriers_are_leaking_what_narrows_the_: Wabebaji wanavuja! Ni nini hupunguza eneo la upungufu?
swahili.electrostatic_discharge_what_protects_: Utoaji wa umeme tuli! Ni nini hulinda IC dhidi ya ESD?
swahili.clock_is_unstable_cmos_power_dissipati: Saa haina utulivu! Utawanyaji wa nguvu wa CMOS unalingana na:
swahili.direct_short_what_is_the_threshold_vol: Mzunguko mfupi wa moja kwa moja! Volteji ya kizingiti ya Si-MOSFET ya kawaida ni ipi?
swahili.electrons_are_tunneling_through_the_ox: Elektroni zinapenya kupitia oksidi! Katika kisima cha kwantamu, kisima chembamba =
swahili.memory_bits_are_flipping_which_memory_: Biti za kumbukumbu zinageuka! Ni aina gani ya kumbukumbu inahitaji kuonyeshwa upya?
swahili.signal_to_noise_ratio_dropping_what_do: Uwiano wa ishara kwa kelele unashuka! Kikuza tofautishi hukataa nini?
swahili.final_boss_what_limits_transistor_scal: Bosi wa mwisho! Ni nini hupunguza upimaji wa transista chini ya oksidi ya lango ya ~1 nm?
swahili.protect_your_chip_from_waves_of_hardwa: Linda chip yako dhidi ya mawimbi ya maadui wa maunzi! Tumia maarifa ya nusukondakta kupambana.
swahili.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Kudopa silikoni kwa fosforasi (aina-n) au boroni (aina-p) ndio msingi wa kila chip iliyowahi kutengenezwa. Makutano ya PN ni kizuizi cha kujenga cha kila diodi + LED + seli ya jua + transista.
swahili.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Pendelea transista, hesabu nishati ya pengo la bendi, tabiri mkondo dhidi ya volteji. Matatizo ya AP Physics 2 + utangulizi wa EE na maoni ya hatua kwa hatua.
swahili.battle_head_to_head_circuit_duels: Vita — mashindano ya mzunguko ana kwa ana
swahili.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Raundi za shinikizo la muda: jenga mzunguko haraka kuliko kipima muda. Hupima kama hoja ya nusukondakta ni ya kiotomatiki, si tu kutambuliwa.
swahili.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley waligundua transista katika Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Sheria ya Moore: idadi ya transista huongezeka maradufu kila ~miaka 2; ilishikilia kwa miaka 50+ kabla ya kupungua.
swahili.minimal_dopant_pure_semiconductor_high: Dopanti ndogo. Nusukondakta safi — uzuiaji wa juu.
swahili.some_carriers_introduced_typical_extri: Wabebaji wachache waliletwa. Utaratibu wa kawaida wa nje.
swahili.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Inakaribia tabia ya metali. Hutumika kwa mawasiliano.
swahili.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Rekebisha ukolezi wa dopanti, joto, nyenzo. Utaratibu tofauti wa bendi 4. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo.
swahili.hypothesis_how_does_temperature_affect: Dhana: Joto huathiri vipi ukolezi wa wabebaji?
swahili.compare_si_and_gaas_at_same_concentrat: Linganisha Si na GaAs katika ukolezi sawa. Kwa nini zinatofautiana?
swahili.find_two_settings_producing_same_regim: Tafuta mipangilio miwili inayozalisha utaratibu sawa.
swahili.explain_how_concentration_temperature_: Eleza jinsi ukolezi, joto, na nyenzo kwa pamoja huamua utaratibu.
swahili.design_note_discrete_4_state_marker_no: Dokezo la muundo: alama tofauti ya hali 4; hakuna alama ya msongamano wa wabebaji; hakuna ufunuo — kwa muundo.

hausa.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Yana juya shigarwa. An gina shi daga PMOS 1 + NMOS 1 (CMOS inverter).
hausa.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Fitarwa tana da yawa kawai lokacin da shigarwa biyu suke da yawa. NAND + NOT (transistor 6).
hausa.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Fitarwa tana da yawa lokacin da kowace shigarwa take da yawa. NOR + NOT (transistor 6).
hausa.universal_gate_2_series_nmos_2_paralle: Ƙofar duniya! NMOS 2 na jere + PMOS 2 masu daidaici. Dukkan dabaru daga NAND.
hausa.universal_gate_2_parallel_nmos_2_serie: Ƙofar duniya! NMOS 2 masu daidaici + PMOS 2 na jere.
hausa.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Fitarwa tana da yawa lokacin da shigarwa suka bambanta. Mahimmanci ga masu tara. Yana amfani da transistor ~8.
hausa.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Fitarwa tana da yawa lokacin da shigarwa suka dace. Ana amfani da shi a masu kwatanta.
hausa.data_table_a_b_q: Tebur na bayanai: A, B, Q
hausa.build_a_circuit_from_components_add_pa: Gina da'ira daga sassa. Ƙara sassa, sannan yi kwaikwayo!
hausa.click_components_above_to_add_them: Danna sassan da ke sama don ƙara su
hausa.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: Ana jan sandan silikon daga narkakken silikon ta hanyar Czochralski a ~1414 °C.
hausa.the_ingot_is_sliced_into_thin_wafers_7: Ana yanke sandan zuwa wafer siriri (~775 μm kauri) da zaren almasi masu yanka.
hausa.a_thin_layer_of_sio_is_grown_on_the_wa: Ana shuka siriri Layer na SiO₂ a saman wafer a ~1000 °C a tanderun oksijin.
hausa.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: Hasken UV yana canja sifofin da'ira daga abin rufe fuska zuwa wafer da aka lulluɓe da fotorezist.
hausa.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: Ana cire abin da ba a so ta hanyar zana na sinadarai (rigar) ko plasma (bushe).
hausa.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: Ana harba atomomin dopant cikin silikon a manyan makamashi don canja abubuwan da suke na wutar lantarki.
hausa.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: Ana ajiye Layer na ƙarfe da insulator ta hanyoyin CVD, PVD ko ALD.
hausa.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: Ana yin sifofin haɗin ƙarfe kuma a goge su lebur. Layer da yawa suna gina wayoyin da'ira.
hausa.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Jadawalin Dokar Moore yana nuna adadin transistor daga 1965 zuwa 2030
hausa.6_transistors_per_bit_2_cross_coupled_: Transistor 6 kowace bit: inverter 2 masu haɗe-haɗe + transistor 2 na shiga. Ana amfani da shi a cache na CPU.
hausa.1_transistor_1_capacitor_per_bit_must_: Transistor 1 + kapasita 1 kowace bit. Dole a sabunta kowane ~64 ms. Ana amfani da shi a babban ƙwaƙwalwa (moduli na RAM).
hausa.floating_gate_transistor_traps_charge_: Transistor mai ƙofa mai iyo yana kama caji. NOR: shiga bazuwar, ana amfani da shi a firmware/BIOS.
hausa.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Ƙofofin iyo da aka haɗa a jere. Shiga na jere amma mai matsananci. SSD, drive na USB, katunan SD.
hausa.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: Kapasita ta feroeletrik tana adana caji da polarizeshon da ya rage. Ba mai canzawa + rubutu mai sauri. Ana amfani da shi a katunan wayo, motoci.
hausa.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Na'urar ƙara ƙarfi na wuta. Babban impedance na shigarwa (∞ don manufa). Riba = -gₘRₓ. Yana juya sigina. Mafi yawan na'urar ƙara ƙarfi na MOSFET.
hausa.voltage_buffer_gain_1_no_inversion_low: Buffer na wuta. Riba ≈ 1 (babu juyawa). Ƙaramar impedance na fitarwa → mai kyau don tuƙa nauyi. Ana kuma kiransa mabiyin tushe.
hausa.current_buffer_low_input_impedance_non: Buffer na yanzu. Ƙaramar impedance na shigarwa. Ba mai juyawa. Fadi bandwidth → mai kyau don aikace-aikacen RF.
hausa.bjt_voltage_amplifier_gain_g_r_inverts: Na'urar ƙara ƙarfi na wuta na BJT. Riba = -gₘRᶜ. Yana juya sigina. Babbar riba fiye da MOSFET amma ƙaramar impedance na shigarwa.
hausa.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Yana ƙara bambancin shigarwa biyu. Yana ƙin surutu na yanayin gama gari. Tushen na'urorin ƙara ƙarfi na op. CMRR yawanci >60dB.
hausa.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Gibin band tsakanin 0.5 da 3.5 eV su ne semiconductor.
hausa.extra_electrons_n_for_negative_charge_: Ƙarin electron = N don masu ɗaukar caji Korau.
hausa.think_of_it_as_multiplication_1_1_1_ev: Ka yi tunanin sa a matsayin ninkawa: 1×1=1, sauran duka=0.
hausa.carriers_recombine_at_the_junction_lea: Masu ɗauka suna sake haɗuwa a haɗin suna barin ion masu tsayawa.
hausa.positive_gate_attracts_electrons_to_fo: Ƙofa mai kyau tana jawo electron don samar da tashar.
hausa.forward_pushing_carriers_toward_the_ju: Gaba = tura masu ɗauka ZUWA haɗin.
hausa.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: Ƙarin makamashin zafi = ƙarin ma'aurata na electron-rami.
hausa.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND na iya aiwatar da NOT, AND, OR — komai!
hausa.pmos_nmos_work_as_a_complementary_pair: PMOS + NMOS suna aiki a matsayin ma'aurata masu cikawa.
hausa.speed_mobility_gaas_8500_vs_si_1400_cm: Gudu ∝ motsi. GaAs: 8500 vs Si: 1400 cm²/Vs.
hausa.zener_diodes_are_designed_to_conduct_i: An tsara diode na Zener don gudanarwa ta baya!
hausa.the_o_in_mos_stands_for_oxide_insulato: "O" a cikin MOS yana nufin Oxide (insulator).
hausa.boron_has_3_valence_electrons_1_fewer_: Boron yana da electron 3 na valence (1 ƙasa da Si).
hausa.v_kt_q_ln_n_n_n_for_typical_doping_lev: Vₑᵢ = (kT/q)ln(NₐNₓ/nᵢ²) don matakan dopin na yau da kullun.
hausa.carbon_forms_very_strong_bonds: Carbon yana samar da ƙarfafan haɗi sosai.
hausa.in_cmos_one_transistor_is_always_off_b: A CMOS, transistor ɗaya koyaushe yana kashe, yana toshe wutar lantarki.
hausa.n_1_for_ideal_junction_n_2_for_recombi: n=1 don manufa haɗin, n=2 don sake haɗuwa a yankin raguwa.
hausa.e_3_4_ev_allows_higher_voltage_operati: Eₗ = 3.4 eV yana ba da damar aiki a babban wuta.
hausa.sum_a_xor_b_carry_a_and_b: Jimla = A XOR B, Ɗauka = A AND B.
hausa.higher_v_ce_widens_the_depletion_regio: Babban V_CE yana fadada yankin raguwa cikin base.
hausa.e_1_l_smaller_box_higher_energy_steps: E ∝ 1/L² — ƙaramin akwati = manyan matakan makamashi.
hausa.telecom_lasers_use_ingaasp_quantum_wel: Leza na sadarwa suna amfani da rijiyoyin kwantum na InGaAsP don ingantaccen sarrafa tsawon igiyar ruwa.
hausa.6t_sram_2_cross_coupled_inverters_4t_2: SRAM 6T: inverter 2 masu haɗe-haɗe (4T) + transistor 2 na shiga.
hausa.dram_stores_bits_as_charge_on_a_tiny_c: DRAM yana adana bit a matsayin caji akan ƙaramin kapasita — yana zubowa!
hausa.the_floating_gate_is_electrically_isol: An raba ƙofa mai iyo ta hanyar wutar lantarki da Layer na oxide.
hausa.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: Cache na L1 yana buƙatar mafi saurin lokacin shiga.
hausa.it_s_a_buffer_unity_gain_impedance_tra: Buffer ne: riba ɗaya, canjin impedance.
hausa.higher_gain_lower_bandwidth_a_bw_gbw_c: Babbar riba = ƙaramin bandwidth. Aᵥ × BW = GBW = tsayayye.
hausa.progress_to_next_rank: Ci gaba zuwa mataki na gaba
hausa.a_swarm_of_logic_bugs_what_gate_output: Tarin kwari na dabaru! Wace ƙofa ce ke fitar da 1 lokacin A=0?
hausa.a_voltage_spike_is_overloading_which_d: Tsalle na wuta yana ɗora fiye da kima! Wace na'ura ce ke sarrafa wuta?
hausa.temperature_rising_in_a_semiconductor_: Zafi yana tashi! A cikin semiconductor, hauhawar zafi tana yin me ga gudanarwa?
hausa.an_enemy_flipped_all_bits_which_gate_c: Abokin gaba ya juya dukkan bit! Wace ƙofa ce za ta iya juya kowace sigina?
hausa.carriers_are_leaking_what_narrows_the_: Masu ɗauka suna zubowa! Me ke kunkunta yankin raguwa?
hausa.electrostatic_discharge_what_protects_: Fitar da wutar lantarki tsaye! Me ke kare IC daga ESD?
hausa.clock_is_unstable_cmos_power_dissipati: Agogo ba shi da kwanciyar hankali! Watsewar ƙarfin CMOS yana daidai da:
hausa.direct_short_what_is_the_threshold_vol: Gajeriyar madaidaiciya! Menene wutar kofa na Si-MOSFET na yau da kullun?
hausa.electrons_are_tunneling_through_the_ox: Electron suna ratsa ta oxide! A cikin rijiyar kwantum, rijiya mai kunkuntar =
hausa.memory_bits_are_flipping_which_memory_: Bit na ƙwaƙwalwa suna juyawa! Wane irin ƙwaƙwalwa ne ke buƙatar sabuntawa?
hausa.signal_to_noise_ratio_dropping_what_do: Rabon sigina zuwa surutu yana sauka! Me na'urar ƙara ƙarfi mai bambanci take ƙi?
hausa.final_boss_what_limits_transistor_scal: Babban shugaba na ƙarshe! Me ke iyakance girman transistor ƙasa da oxide na kofa na ~1 nm?
hausa.protect_your_chip_from_waves_of_hardwa: Kare chip ɗinka daga raƙuman ruwa na maƙiyan kayan aiki! Yi amfani da ilimin semiconductor don yaƙar baya.
hausa.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Dopa silikon da fosforus (nau'in-n) ko boron (nau'in-p) shine tushen kowace chip da aka taɓa yi. Haɗin PN shine tubalin gina kowace diode + LED + kwayar hasken rana + transistor.
hausa.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Karkatar da transistor, ƙididdige makamashin gibin band, hasashen yanzu da wuta. Matsalolin AP Physics 2 + gabatarwar EE da ra'ayi mataki-mataki.
hausa.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Zagayen matsin lokaci: gina da'ira da sauri fiye da agogo. Yana gwada ko tunanin semiconductor na atomatik ne, ba kawai an gane shi ba.
hausa.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley sun ƙirƙira transistor a Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Dokar Moore: adadin transistor yana ninkawa kowane ~shekaru 2; ya riƙe shekaru 50+ kafin raguwa.
hausa.minimal_dopant_pure_semiconductor_high: Ƙaramin dopant. Semiconductor mai tsafta — babban juriya.
hausa.some_carriers_introduced_typical_extri: An gabatar da wasu masu ɗauka. Tsarin waje na yau da kullun.
hausa.strong_conductivity_used_in_transistor: Ƙarfin gudanarwa, ana amfani da shi a transistor.
hausa.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Yana kusanci hali na ƙarfe. Ana amfani da shi don haɗin gwiwa.
hausa.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Daidaita ƙarfin dopant, zafi, kayan. Tsarin band 4 daban. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_how_does_temperature_affect: Hasashe: Ta yaya zafi ke shafar ƙarfin masu ɗauka?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Na makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.compare_si_and_gaas_at_same_concentrat: Kwatanta Si da GaAs a ƙarfi iri ɗaya. Me ya sa suka bambanta?
hausa.find_two_settings_producing_same_regim: Nemo saituna biyu masu samar da tsari iri ɗaya.
hausa.explain_how_concentration_temperature_: Bayyana yadda ƙarfi, zafi, da kayan tare suke ƙayyade tsari.
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_state_marker_no: Bayanin ƙira: alamar hali 4 daban; babu makin yawan masu ɗauka; babu bayyanawa — bisa ƙira.
